gt_sql: SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T2.raceId = 592 AND T2.time IS NOT NULL AND T1.dob IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.dob ASC LIMIT 1
pred_sql: SELECT d.forename, d.surname FROM results r JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId WHERE r.raceId = 592 AND r.time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY d.dob ASC LIMIT 1;
question: For all the drivers who finished the game in race No. 592, who is the oldest?
